answer:
Oh man, I've got to tell you about the time I visited the Grand Canyon. Before I went, I was just a bundle of nerves and excitement. I mean, it's one of those places you see in all the travel magazines and on TV, and I was dying to see it for myself. I was like a kid on Christmas Eve, couldn't sleep the night before.
When I finally got there, it was like, whoa! The view was just mind-blowing. I remember standing on the edge, looking out over this massive chasm that seemed to go on forever. The colors were incredible—reds, oranges, and browns blending together in this crazy tapestry. And the scale of it all, it was just so vast that it made me feel tiny, you know?
What really got me though was the silence. Despite all the tourists, there was this peaceful quiet that let you really take in the grandeur of it all. It was like time stood still. I could have stood there for hours just taking it all in. It was definitely a moment I'll never forget, and it made me appreciate the beauty of nature in a whole new way.
title: Tell me about a well-known place you've been to. How did you feel before going there? What impressed you most when you got there?
extData:
{"pronuncFile":"/20250117/2395ac54d4b848bd95f20c25c0a9c0cb.mp3","answerTemplate":"开场陈述：
首先，对这个地方做一个简短的介绍："One of the most remarkable places I've visited is [name of the place], which is famous for [brief description of its significance or appeal]."
正文：
访问前：
分享你去之前的感受："Before visiting, I felt [emotion, such as excited, anxious, curious] because [reason for that emotion, like its reputation or my personal interest]."
提及你当时的一些期望："I expected [describe what you anticipated, such as the sights or experiences you hoped to have]."
在该地的体验：
描述你到达时的第一印象："When I finally arrived, I was immediately captivated by [mention the first thing that struck you, such as the scenery, architecture, or atmosphere]."
突出最让你印象深刻的部分："The most impressive aspect of [name of the place] was [specific feature or experience], which made me feel [emotion, like awe, joy, or nostalgia]."
提供一个具体的例子："For instance, [describe a particular moment or detail that stood out to you], which truly enhanced my visit."
结论：
总结你的整体体验："In conclusion, visiting [name of the place] was an unforgettable experience that [share the impact it had on you, such as broadened my perspective or created lasting memories]."
最后的想法："I highly recommend [the place] to anyone who [mention suitable audience or type of travel]."","titleTranslate":"告诉我一个你去过的著名景点。在去之前你有什么感受？当你到达那里时，什么让你印象最深刻？"}
